name: Handshake

steps.condition: There can be a race between the Requester sending packets and deasserting
All data packets are sent for a CopyBack transaction that completes with a data transfer.
CompAck for a CopyBack transaction that completes without a data transfer.
Complete all snoop accesses to the interface before it
must not contain Must not send Snoop

completionCondition: SACTIVE must be asserted during coherency state transition periods to guarantee SYSCOACK the transit
